title: fix: SEO improvements for Google indexing
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Maps for the spiders
gist.blurb: We've updated our sitemaps and robots.txt to help search engines navigate the hive more efficiently. No more getting lost in infinite API loops!
gist.summary: Fixed canonical URLs and updated robots.txt to improve Google Search indexing across the main website.
gist.impact: Search engines will now correctly index individual pages like /apps and /community instead of treating them as duplicates of the homepage.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a guide for a cute pixel-art spider (representing web crawlers) in a digital garden. Holding a map or a signpost.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny explorer's hat, holding a map and guiding a friendly little mechanical spider through a digital garden. A wooden signpost points to different areas. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
